title: The film release
wikitext:
[]: The film release.             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Mar 06, 2021 12:51 pm Does anyone know if the release this week is expected to be subtitled and where to buy it, please? I'm in the UK, but feel free to share info about releases in other countries too for the benefit of other members.

[]: Re: The film release.             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 06, 2021 12:54 pm It's a theatrical release, not a BluRay or DVD release. You'd have to buy a ticket to a theater in Japan to see it, unfortunately.

[]: Re: The film release.             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Mar 06, 2021 12:59 pm UrsusArctos wrote: It's a theatrical release, not a BluRay or DVD release. You'd have to buy a ticket to a theater in Japan to see it, unfortunately.

[]: Re: The film release.             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Mar 06, 2021 1:00 pm Everything else you may read, about releases in different countries, when the disks will come out, and the possibility of streaming, is still simply speculation .

[]: Re: The film release.             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Mar 06, 2021 1:02 pm pwhodges wrote: Everything else you may read, about releases in different countries, when the disks will come out, and the possibility of streaming, is still simply speculation .
